parameters.query:
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'store_id') AS has_store_id,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'sku') AS has_sku,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'unit') AS has_unit,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'category') AS has_category,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'brand') AS has_brand,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'is_active') AS has_is_active,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'created_at') AS has_created_at,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'updated_at') AS has_updated_at;

={{ (() => { const storeId = Number($('Normalize Worker Input').first().json.store_id || 0); return `SELECT item_name, price, stock, COALESCE(sku, '') AS sku, COALESCE(unit, '') AS unit, COALESCE(category, '') AS category, COALESCE(brand, '') AS brand, COALESCE(is_active, true) AS is_active FROM public.inventory ${storeId > 0 ? `WHERE store_id = ${storeId}` : ''} ORDER BY item_name ASC LIMIT 10000;`; })() }}

parameters.jsCode: const d = $('Determine Worker Source').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { chat_id: d.chat_id || '', message_type: 'text', body_text: d.error_message || 'I could not prepare that bulk import.', test_mode: d.test_mode === true } }];
const d = $('Determine Worker Source').first().json || {}; return (Array.isArray(d.test_sheet_rows) ? d.test_sheet_rows : []).map((row) => ({ json: row }));

const input = $input.first(); const d = $('Determine Worker Source').first().json || {}; if (String(d.test_file_base64 || '').trim()) { return [{ json: d, binary: { data: { data: String(d.test_file_base64 || ''), mimeType: String(d.test_file_mime_type || d.media_mime_type || 'application/octet-stream'), fileName: String(d.test_file_name || d.media_filename || 'owner_upload') } } }]; } return [{ json: d, binary: input?.binary || {} }];

parameters.text: Extract kirana inventory rows from this stock sheet. Return strict JSON only in this shape: {"document_confidence":0.0,"quality_notes":[],"rows":[{"item_name":"","sku":"","price":0,"stock":0,"unit":"","category":"","brand":"","raw_line":"","row_confidence":0.0,"needs_review":false,"review_reason":""}],"invalid_rows":[{"raw_line":"","reason":"","row_confidence":0.0}]}. Use confidence between 0 and 1. If any field is unclear, do not guess and do not output 0 as a placeholder. Put uncertain rows into invalid_rows. Never include markdown.

Read this kirana stock image and return strict JSON only in this shape: {"document_confidence":0.0,"quality_notes":[],"rows":[{"item_name":"","sku":"","price":0,"stock":0,"unit":"","category":"","brand":"","raw_line":"","row_confidence":0.0,"needs_review":false,"review_reason":""}],"invalid_rows":[{"raw_line":"","reason":"","row_confidence":0.0}]}. Use confidence between 0 and 1. Use only visible text. If price or stock is unclear, do not guess and do not output 0 as a placeholder; put the row into invalid_rows instead. Never include markdown.

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json || {};
const esc = (value) => String(value === undefined || value === null ? '' : value).replace(/'/g, "''");
const jsonLiteral = (value) => "'" + esc(JSON.stringify(value)) + "'::jsonb";
const resultSelect = (result, message) => "SELECT '" + esc(result) + "' AS result, " + jsonLiteral({}) + " AS summary_json, " + jsonLiteral({}) + " AS report_manifest_json, '" + esc(message || '') + "' AS message, '' AS job_id;";

const ensureSql = [
  'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.owner_import_jobs (',
  '  job_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,',
  '  store_id BIGINT,',
  '  chat_id TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  source_type TEXT,',
  '  status TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  parsed_rows_json JSONB DEFAULT \'[]\'::jsonb,',
  '  invalid_rows_json JSONB DEFAULT \'[]\'::jsonb,',
  '  file_name TEXT,',
  '  mime_type TEXT,',
  '  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),',
  '  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()',
  ');',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_ref TEXT;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mode TEXT;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS total_rows INTEGER DEFAULT 0;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS valid_rows INTEGER DEFAULT 0;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invalid_rows INTEGER DEFAULT 0;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ambiguous_rows INTEGER DEFAULT 0;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS matched_rows INTEGER DEFAULT 0;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS new_rows INTEGER DEFAULT 0;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS applied_rows INTEGER DEFAULT 0;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failed_rows INTEGER DEFAULT 0;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS report_manifest_json JSONB DEFAULT \'{}\'::jsonb;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS report_token TEXT;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS started_at TIMESTAMPTZ;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS finished_at TIMESTAMPTZ;',
  'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.owner_import_job_rows (',
  '  job_id TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  row_no INTEGER NOT NULL,',
  '  chunk_no INTEGER NOT NULL,',
  '  raw_payload_json JSONB DEFAULT \'{}\'::jsonb,',
  '  normalized_payload_json JSONB DEFAULT \'{}\'::jsonb,',
  '  match_status TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  target_inventory_id BIGINT,',
  '  target_sku TEXT,',
  '  target_item_name TEXT,',
  '  error_reason TEXT,',
  '  review_reason TEXT,',
  '  row_hash TEXT,',
  '  apply_status TEXT DEFAULT \'pending\',',
  '  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),',
  '  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),',
  '  PRIMARY KEY (job_id, row_no)',
  ');',
  'CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS owner_import_job_rows_job_status_idx ON public.owner_import_job_rows (job_id, match_status, apply_status);',
  'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.owner_operation_sessions (',
  '  session_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,',
  '  store_id BIGINT,',
  '  chat_id TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  operation_type TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  source_type TEXT NOT NULL,',
  "  parsed_payload_json JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,",
  "  cleanup_summary_json JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,",
  "  preview_rows_json JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,",
  '  status TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),',
  '  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()',
  ');',
].join('\n');

if (d.worker_result !== 'staged') {
  return [{ json: { ...d, sql: ensureSql + '\n' + resultSelect(d.worker_result || 'failed', d.body_text || 'I could not stage that bulk import safely.') } }];
}

const stagedRows = Array.isArray(d.staged_rows) ? d.staged_rows : [];
const summary = d.summary || {};
const reportManifest = d.report_manifest || {};
const invalidRows = stagedRows.filter((row) => row.match_status === 'invalid' || row.match_status === 'ambiguous');
const status = Number(summary.valid_rows || 0) > 0 ? 'awaiting_review' : 'failed';
const sessionId = 'bulk_' + esc(d.job_id || '');

const sql = [
  ensureSql,
  "DELETE FROM public.owner_import_job_rows WHERE job_id = '" + esc(d.job_id) + "';",
  'WITH rows AS (',
  "  SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset(" + jsonLiteral(stagedRows) + ") AS r(row_no integer, chunk_no integer, raw_payload jsonb, normalized_payload jsonb, match_status text, target_inventory_id bigint, target_sku text, target_item_name text, error_reason text, review_reason text, row_hash text, apply_status text, suggested_sku text)",
  '), ins AS (',
  '  INSERT INTO public.owner_import_job_rows (job_id, row_no, chunk_no, raw_payload_json, normalized_payload_json, match_status, target_inventory_id, target_sku, target_item_name, error_reason, review_reason, row_hash, apply_status, created_at, updated_at)',
  "  SELECT '" + esc(d.job_id) + "', row_no, chunk_no, COALESCE(raw_payload, '{}'::jsonb), COALESCE(normalized_payload, '{}'::jsonb), COALESCE(match_status, 'invalid'), target_inventory_id, COALESCE(target_sku, ''), COALESCE(target_item_name, ''), COALESCE(error_reason, ''), COALESCE(review_reason, ''), COALESCE(row_hash, ''), COALESCE(apply_status, 'pending'), NOW(), NOW() FROM rows",
  '  ON CONFLICT (job_id, row_no) DO UPDATE SET',
  '    chunk_no = EXCLUDED.chunk_no,',
  '    raw_payload_json = EXCLUDED.raw_payload_json,',
  '    normalized_payload_json = EXCLUDED.normalized_payload_json,',
  '    match_status = EXCLUDED.match_status,',
  '    target_inventory_id = EXCLUDED.target_inventory_id,',
  '    target_sku = EXCLUDED.target_sku,',
  '    target_item_name = EXCLUDED.target_item_name,',
  '    error_reason = EXCLUDED.error_reason,',
  '    review_reason = EXCLUDED.review_reason,',
  '    row_hash = EXCLUDED.row_hash,',
  '    apply_status = EXCLUDED.apply_status,',
  '    updated_at = NOW()',
  '  RETURNING row_no',
  '), job_upsert AS (',
  '  INSERT INTO public.owner_import_jobs (job_id, store_id, chat_id, source_type, source_ref, mode, status, total_rows, valid_rows, invalid_rows, ambiguous_rows, matched_rows, new_rows, applied_rows, failed_rows, report_manifest_json, report_token, started_at, finished_at, parsed_rows_json, invalid_rows_json, file_name, mime_type, created_at, updated_at)',
  "  VALUES ('" + esc(d.job_id) + "', " + Number(d.store_id || 0) + ", '" + esc(d.chat_id) + "', '" + esc(d.source_type || d.import_kind || '') + "', '" + esc(d.source_ref || d.media_filename || '') + "', 'bulk_onboarding', '" + esc(status) + "', " + Number(summary.total_rows || 0) + ", " + Number(summary.valid_rows || 0) + ", " + Number(summary.invalid_rows || 0) + ", " + Number(summary.ambiguous_rows || 0) + ", " + Number(summary.matched_rows || 0) + ", " + Number(summary.new_rows || 0) + ", 0, 0, " + jsonLiteral(reportManifest) + ", '" + esc(d.report_token || '') + "', NOW(), NOW(), " + jsonLiteral(stagedRows) + ", " + jsonLiteral(invalidRows) + ", '" + esc(d.media_filename || '') + "', '" + esc(d.media_mime_type || '') + "', NOW(), NOW())",
  '  ON CONFLICT (job_id) DO UPDATE SET',
  "    store_id = EXCLUDED.store_id, chat_id = EXCLUDED.chat_id, source_type = EXCLUDED.source_type, source_ref = EXCLUDED.source_ref, mode = EXCLUDED.mode, status = EXCLUDED.status, total_rows = EXCLUDED.total_rows, valid_rows = EXCLUDED.valid_rows, invalid_rows = EXCLUDED.invalid_rows, ambiguous_rows = EXCLUDED.ambiguous_rows, matched_rows = EXCLUDED.matched_rows, new_rows = EXCLUDED.new_rows, applied_rows = EXCLUDED.applied_rows, failed_rows = EXCLUDED.failed_rows, report_manifest_json = EXCLUDED.report_manifest_json, report_token = EXCLUDED.report_token, started_at = EXCLUDED.started_at, finished_at = EXCLUDED.finished_at, parsed_rows_json = EXCLUDED.parsed_rows_json, invalid_rows_json = EXCLUDED.invalid_rows_json, file_name = EXCLUDED.file_name, mime_type = EXCLUDED.mime_type, updated_at = NOW()",
  '  RETURNING job_id',
  '), session_upsert AS (',
  '  INSERT INTO public.owner_operation_sessions (session_id, store_id, chat_id, operation_type, source_type, parsed_payload_json, cleanup_summary_json, preview_rows_json, status, created_at, updated_at)',
  "  VALUES ('" + sessionId + "', " + Number(d.store_id || 0) + ", '" + esc(d.chat_id) + "', 'bulk_import_review', '" + esc(d.source_type || d.import_kind || '') + "', " + jsonLiteral({ source_ref: d.source_ref || '', file_name: d.media_filename || '', parse_mode: d.parse_mode || '' }) + ", " + jsonLiteral(summary) + ", '[]'::jsonb, '" + esc(status) + "', NOW(), NOW())",
  '  ON CONFLICT (session_id) DO UPDATE SET',
  "    store_id = EXCLUDED.store_id, chat_id = EXCLUDED.chat_id, operation_type = EXCLUDED.operation_type, source_type = EXCLUDED.source_type, parsed_payload_json = EXCLUDED.parsed_payload_json, cleanup_summary_json = EXCLUDED.cleanup_summary_json, preview_rows_json = EXCLUDED.preview_rows_json, status = EXCLUDED.status, updated_at = NOW()",
  '  RETURNING session_id',
  ')',
  "SELECT '" + esc(status) + "' AS result, " + jsonLiteral(summary) + " AS summary_json, " + jsonLiteral(reportManifest) + " AS report_manifest_json, '' AS message, '" + esc(d.job_id) + "' AS job_id;",
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { ...d, sql } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'store_id') AS has_store_id,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'sku') AS has_sku,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'unit') AS has_unit,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'category') AS has_category,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'brand') AS has_brand,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'is_active') AS has_is_active,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'created_at') AS has_created_at,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'updated_at') AS has_updated_at;

={{ (() => { const storeId = Number($('Normalize Worker Input').first().json.store_id || 0); return `SELECT item_name, price, stock, COALESCE(sku, '') AS sku, COALESCE(unit, '') AS unit, COALESCE(category, '') AS category, COALESCE(brand, '') AS brand, COALESCE(is_active, true) AS is_active FROM public.inventory ${storeId > 0 ? `WHERE store_id = ${storeId}` : ''} ORDER BY item_name ASC LIMIT 10000;`; })() }}

const d = $('Determine Worker Source').first().json || {}; return (Array.isArray(d.test_sheet_rows) ? d.test_sheet_rows : []).map((row) => ({ json: row }));

const input = $input.first(); const d = $('Determine Worker Source').first().json || {}; if (String(d.test_file_base64 || '').trim()) { return [{ json: d, binary: { data: { data: String(d.test_file_base64 || ''), mimeType: String(d.test_file_mime_type || d.media_mime_type || 'application/octet-stream'), fileName: String(d.test_file_name || d.media_filename || 'owner_upload') } } }]; } return [{ json: d, binary: input?.binary || {} }];

const ensureSql = [
  'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.owner_import_jobs (',
  '  job_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,',
  '  store_id BIGINT,',
  '  chat_id TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  source_type TEXT,',

  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS matched_rows INTEGER DEFAULT 0;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS new_rows INTEGER DEFAULT 0;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS applied_rows INTEGER DEFAULT 0;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failed_rows INTEGER DEFAULT 0;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS report_manifest_json JSONB DEFAULT \'{}\'::jsonb;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS report_token TEXT;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS started_at TIMESTAMPTZ;',
  'ALTER TABLE public.owner_import_jobs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS finished_at TIMESTAMPTZ;',
  'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.owner_import_job_rows (',
  '  job_id TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  row_no INTEGER NOT NULL,',
  '  chunk_no INTEGER NOT NULL,',
  '  raw_payload_json JSONB DEFAULT \'{}\'::jsonb,',
  '  normalized_payload_json JSONB DEFAULT \'{}\'::jsonb,',
  '  match_status TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  target_inventory_id BIGINT,',
  '  target_sku TEXT,',
  '  target_item_name TEXT,',
  '  error_reason TEXT,',
  '  review_reason TEXT,',
  '  row_hash TEXT,',
  '  apply_status TEXT DEFAULT \'pending\',',
  '  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),',
  '  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),',
  '  PRIMARY KEY (job_id, row_no)',
  ');',
  'CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS owner_import_job_rows_job_status_idx ON public.owner_import_job_rows (job_id, match_status, apply_status);',
  'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.owner_operation_sessions (',
  '  session_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,',
  '  store_id BIGINT,',
  '  chat_id TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  operation_type TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  source_type TEXT NOT NULL,',
  "  parsed_payload_json JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,",
  "  cleanup_summary_json JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,",
  "  preview_rows_json JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,",
  '  status TEXT NOT NULL,',
  '  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),',
  '  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()',
  ');',
].join('\n');

if (d.worker_result !== 'staged') {
  return [{ json: { ...d, sql: ensureSql + '\n' + resultSelect(d.worker_result || 'failed', d.body_text || 'I could not stage that bulk import safely.') } }];
}

const stagedRows = Array.isArray(d.staged_rows) ? d.staged_rows : [];
const summary = d.summary || {};
const reportManifest = d.report_manifest || {};
const invalidRows = stagedRows.filter((row) => row.match_status === 'invalid' || row.match_status === 'ambiguous');
const status = Number(summary.valid_rows || 0) > 0 ? 'awaiting_review' : 'failed';
const sessionId = 'bulk_' + esc(d.job_id || '');

const sql = [
  ensureSql,
  "DELETE FROM public.owner_import_job_rows WHERE job_id = '" + esc(d.job_id) + "';",
  'WITH rows AS (',
  "  SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset(" + jsonLiteral(stagedRows) + ") AS r(row_no integer, chunk_no integer, raw_payload jsonb, normalized_payload jsonb, match_status text, target_inventory_id bigint, target_sku text, target_item_name text, error_reason text, review_reason text, row_hash text, apply_status text, suggested_sku text)",
  '), ins AS (',
  '  INSERT INTO public.owner_import_job_rows (job_id, row_no, chunk_no, raw_payload_json, normalized_payload_json, match_status, target_inventory_id, target_sku, target_item_name, error_reason, review_reason, row_hash, apply_status, created_at, updated_at)',
  "  SELECT '" + esc(d.job_id) + "', row_no, chunk_no, COALESCE(raw_payload, '{}'::jsonb), COALESCE(normalized_payload, '{}'::jsonb), COALESCE(match_status, 'invalid'), target_inventory_id, COALESCE(target_sku, ''), COALESCE(target_item_name, ''), COALESCE(error_reason, ''), COALESCE(review_reason, ''), COALESCE(row_hash, ''), COALESCE(apply_status, 'pending'), NOW(), NOW() FROM rows",
  '  ON CONFLICT (job_id, row_no) DO UPDATE SET',
  '    chunk_no = EXCLUDED.chunk_no,',
  '    raw_payload_json = EXCLUDED.raw_payload_json,',
  '    normalized_payload_json = EXCLUDED.normalized_payload_json,',
  '    match_status = EXCLUDED.match_status,',
  '    target_inventory_id = EXCLUDED.target_inventory_id,',
  '    target_sku = EXCLUDED.target_sku,',
  '    target_item_name = EXCLUDED.target_item_name,',
  '    error_reason = EXCLUDED.error_reason,',
  '    review_reason = EXCLUDED.review_reason,',
  '    row_hash = EXCLUDED.row_hash,',
  '    apply_status = EXCLUDED.apply_status,',
  '    updated_at = NOW()',
  '  RETURNING row_no',
  '), job_upsert AS (',
  '  INSERT INTO public.owner_import_jobs (job_id, store_id, chat_id, source_type, source_ref, mode, status, total_rows, valid_rows, invalid_rows, ambiguous_rows, matched_rows, new_rows, applied_rows, failed_rows, report_manifest_json, report_token, started_at, finished_at, parsed_rows_json, invalid_rows_json, file_name, mime_type, created_at, updated_at)',
  "  VALUES ('" + esc(d.job_id) + "', " + Number(d.store_id || 0) + ", '" + esc(d.chat_id) + "', '" + esc(d.source_type || d.import_kind || '') + "', '" + esc(d.source_ref || d.media_filename || '') + "', 'bulk_onboarding', '" + esc(status) + "', " + Number(summary.total_rows || 0) + ", " + Number(summary.valid_rows || 0) + ", " + Number(summary.invalid_rows || 0) + ", " + Number(summary.ambiguous_rows || 0) + ", " + Number(summary.matched_rows || 0) + ", " + Number(summary.new_rows || 0) + ", 0, 0, " + jsonLiteral(reportManifest) + ", '" + esc(d.report_token || '') + "', NOW(), NOW(), " + jsonLiteral(stagedRows) + ", " + jsonLiteral(invalidRows) + ", '" + esc(d.media_filename || '') + "', '" + esc(d.media_mime_type || '') + "', NOW(), NOW())",
  '  ON CONFLICT (job_id) DO UPDATE SET',
  "    store_id = EXCLUDED.store_id, chat_id = EXCLUDED.chat_id, source_type = EXCLUDED.source_type, source_ref = EXCLUDED.source_ref, mode = EXCLUDED.mode, status = EXCLUDED.status, total_rows = EXCLUDED.total_rows, valid_rows = EXCLUDED.valid_rows, invalid_rows = EXCLUDED.invalid_rows, ambiguous_rows = EXCLUDED.ambiguous_rows, matched_rows = EXCLUDED.matched_rows, new_rows = EXCLUDED.new_rows, applied_rows = EXCLUDED.applied_rows, failed_rows = EXCLUDED.failed_rows, report_manifest_json = EXCLUDED.report_manifest_json, report_token = EXCLUDED.report_token, started_at = EXCLUDED.started_at, finished_at = EXCLUDED.finished_at, parsed_rows_json = EXCLUDED.parsed_rows_json, invalid_rows_json = EXCLUDED.invalid_rows_json, file_name = EXCLUDED.file_name, mime_type = EXCLUDED.mime_type, updated_at = NOW()",
  '  RETURNING job_id',
  '), session_upsert AS (',
  '  INSERT INTO public.owner_operation_sessions (session_id, store_id, chat_id, operation_type, source_type, parsed_payload_json, cleanup_summary_json, preview_rows_json, status, created_at, updated_at)',
  "  VALUES ('" + sessionId + "', " + Number(d.store_id || 0) + ", '" + esc(d.chat_id) + "', 'bulk_import_review', '" + esc(d.source_type || d.import_kind || '') + "', " + jsonLiteral({ source_ref: d.source_ref || '', file_name: d.media_filename || '', parse_mode: d.parse_mode || '' }) + ", " + jsonLiteral(summary) + ", '[]'::jsonb, '" + esc(status) + "', NOW(), NOW())",
  '  ON CONFLICT (session_id) DO UPDATE SET',
  "    store_id = EXCLUDED.store_id, chat_id = EXCLUDED.chat_id, operation_type = EXCLUDED.operation_type, source_type = EXCLUDED.source_type, parsed_payload_json = EXCLUDED.parsed_payload_json, cleanup_summary_json = EXCLUDED.cleanup_summary_json, preview_rows_json = EXCLUDED.preview_rows_json, status = EXCLUDED.status, updated_at = NOW()",
  '  RETURNING session_id',
  ')',
  "SELECT '" + esc(status) + "' AS result, " + jsonLiteral(summary) + " AS summary_json, " + jsonLiteral(reportManifest) + " AS report_manifest_json, '' AS message, '" + esc(d.job_id) + "' AS job_id;",
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { ...d, sql } }];
